name: temp_js
description: A statically-typed, immutable-by-default language that compiles to JavaScript

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=test/** test/parser.test.js test/compiler.test.js test/analyzer.test.js test/optimizer.test.js test/generator.test.js

author: Quinn Austin, Colin Bajo-Smith, Max Lehmann
